RuleSet.Name: src/SchemaSMWar/SchemaSMWarSecMainHtml.java
RuleSet.Descr: Java 11 Sec Manager Sec Main Servlet
RuleSet.GenRule: while( iterDev.hasNext() ) { secDev = iterDev.next(); out.println( "" + ( ( secDev == defDev ) ? "(*) " : "" ) + secDev.getRequiredDevName() + "" + ( ( secDev != defDev ) ? "Make Default" : "" ) + "" + ( ( secDev != defDev ) ? "Delete" : "" ) + "" ); }
